# Changelog

## 0.2.0

- Added 20 innovative migration features including What-if Simulator, Migration Knowledge Graph, Do Not Migrate Report, Value Tracker, Data Quality Profiler, Scope Monitor, ADRs, Pattern Library, and Workshop Prompt Pack.
- Added direct integration scaffolding for AX SQL, Azure DevOps, LCS, D365FO metadata, usage telemetry, and expanded D365FO knowledge base.
- Added unified CLI with `init`, `analyze`, `scan-code`, `dashboard`, `extract-modelstore`, `export`, and `validate` commands.
- Added X++ / XPO / AOT text scanning.
- Added configurable cost model, risk rules, industry packs, and D365FO standard feature map.
- Added HTML command center dashboard with search, category filter, and sortable columns.
- Added XLSX and PPTX export script.
- Added modelstore CSV normalizer.
- Added plugin validation script and unit tests.

## 0.1.0

- Initial AX to D365FO migration expert plugin.
- Added migration skill, templates, analyzer reports, and workspace generator.
